name: Flesh Reshape Escape

rulesText.description: When hit, grappled, restrained, knocked prone, paralyzed, forced into a shape, or targeted by a body-restricting effect, Capella may immediately use Flesh Polymorph.

desc: When hit, grappled, restrained, knocked prone, paralyzed, forced into a shape, or targeted by a body-restricting effect, Capella may immediately use Flesh Polymorph.
